description: Derives 10 fundamental quantities from alpha_EM as single measured input plus the framework's geometric and gauge group constants. The derivation chains use: (1) two-loop unification with CD gap ratio 38/27 for alpha_s and sin2_theta_W, (2) QED series with Laporta A4 for a_e, (3) full SM prediction for a_mu, (4) Koide K = 2/3 = R3/R2 for m_tau, (5) EW relations for M_Z and M_W, (6) lattice factor C = 6*beta for m_p/Lambda_QCD, (7) beta/3 = pi/12 for Omega_DM, (8) DM/baryon ratio for Omega_b.
thesis: From alpha_EM alone, plus geometric constants (pi, zeta, beta) and gauge group integers (beta coefficients, Casimirs, representations), 10 independently measured quantities are derivable at precisions from 4 ppb to 1%.
formula: alpha_EM -> {alpha_s, sin2_theta_W, a_e, a_mu, m_tau, M_Z, M_W, m_p/Lambda, Omega_DM, Omega_b}
